text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan isn't feeling well, so I take her to
the infirmary to rest.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Really? I can just lie down and get some sleep?
Siiick—what a lifesaver.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Heeey, pass it to me! And she shoots—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
The hell? I can't jump at all... My legs feel like
cement!

text_block_list.name: Opponent Gyaru A
text_block_list.text:
Gyahaha! You think you're a match for us with
that weak-nail game of yours?

text_block_list.name: Opponent Gyaru B
text_block_list.text:
You're, like, a bajillion years away from being
good enough to compete at the Gyaru Basketball
Championship!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: No you didn't just say that!

TIME OUT! Hey, Jordan, you gotta stay calm and
go for it!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? And you are?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, that jumbo size bottle... Don't tell me
you're—

text_block_list.name: Nail Strengthener EX
text_block_list.text: OHHH YEEEAH! It's your partner in shine, your forever nail buddy! Athletic Nail-Strengthening Hyper Guard EX!

text_block_list.name: Nail Strengthener EX
text_block_list.text: Come on, it's time to use me! DO IT!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Shalalalala lala la! ♪)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! The heck is this?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It feels amaaazing! Whoosh! Three-point shot! Eat
it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And the whistle sounds!

text_block_list.name: Nail Strengthener EX
text_block_list.text: Great! Nice shot! I'm in your fan club from now on!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeaaah! I did it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan goes back to training looking very
refreshed.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? But nothing's happening...

text_block_list.name: Nail Strengthener EX
text_block_list.text:
NOOO! What have I done?! I've solidified inside
the bottle!

text_block_list.name: Opponent Gyarus
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! You couldn't even close the lid right?
How ratchet! Boom! Slam dunk!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Rrrgh! What a bunch of flamers! I closed it
properly!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I did close it... I think.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Due to her disturbing dream, Tosen Jordan isn't
able to get back to normal.
